description_long: This radiator features a rectangular, horizontally-oriented body with a series of parallel, evenly spaced horizontal panels forming the main heat-dissipating surface. The exterior is finished in a dark, likely metallic color, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The side views reveal a slim profile with small protruding elements, likely for mounting or pipe connections. The top and bottom edges are reinforced with thicker bars, providing structural stability and a clean outline. The overall construction suggests durability and efficient heat distribution, suitable for urban interiors such as garages, hallways, or utility rooms. No visible control valves or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
description: A sleek, dark-colored radiator with horizontal panels and a slim, rectangular profile, designed for efficient heat distribution and urban utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the radiator with four prominent horizontal panels and side mounting features.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the radiator's slim profile and the alignment of the horizontal panels, with small protrusions visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the horizontal panel arrangement and structural bars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and mounting or connection points.
attribute_pipe_connections: two side entry points, one on each vertical edge
